creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
On Sun, May 08, 2011 at 11:32:15AM +0300, Andriy Gapon wrote:
> on 07/05/2011 16:33 Juergen Lock said the following:
> > On Sat, May 07, 2011 at 01:57:20PM +0300, Andriy Gapon wrote:
> >> - Update to 2.2.0.25
> >>
> >> Perhaps this should actually be an update for skype-devel,
> >> while skype could be updated to the latest 2.1.x?
> > 
> > Yes that would make sense since it's still unknown why video
> > doesn't work with 2.2.0.25 for everyone(?) except kvm, while
> > with 2.1.0.81 (as well as with the old version) it now works
> > after my Linuxolator v4l2 patches that meanwhile are in head, and
> > which I also just made a port of for people running older versions:
> > 
> > 	http://people.freebsd.org/~nox/dvb/linux_v4l2wrapper-kmod.shar
> > 
> > And btw you might want to add libv4l to USE_LINUX_APPS and maybe
> > even add the LD_PRELOAD for it's Linux usr/lib/libv4l/v4l2convert.so
> > to the startup script for the benefit of people using cameras
> > without builtin YUV video support:
> 
> I like your suggestion and I agree that skype-devel should be updated that way.

You mean the net/skype one since this is 2.1.0.81?  skype-devel I'd
say should be the latest beta.

> Thank you for the port!
> 
> > Index: Makefile
> > ===================================================================
> > RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/net/skype/Makefile,v
> > retrieving revision 1.57
> > diff -u -p -r1.57 Makefile
> > --- Makefile	17 Mar 2011 11:08:42 -0000	1.57
> > +++ Makefile	7 May 2011 12:33:25 -0000
> > @@ -9,11 +9,11 @@
> >  #
> >  
> >  PORTNAME=	skype
> > -PORTVERSION=	2.0.0.72
> > +PORTVERSION=	2.1.0.81
> >  PORTEPOCH=	1
> > [...]
